blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: Like — when I know what I want, I usually make it smaller before I say it. So the other person doesn't feel pressured. So I seem easy to be around.

blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: I think the things I actually want are kind of a lot.

blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: Like — I want to matter to people. Not famously. Not a lot of people. But I want to actually mean something to the ones I choose. And sometimes that scares people away.
I stayed very still. Because I didn't want to be one of the people she'd made herself smaller for.
She turned and looked at me. Really looked.
Another one of those pauses. The city doing its thing around us. The late buses pulling up and pulling away. Neither of us moved.

blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: You're different when you're not thinking about what you're supposed to say.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: I know. I'm working on getting here faster.

blocks.prompt: She said the real version of what she wants. She's looking at you now.

options.label: Stay very still. Let her know she didn't scare you.
